title: TEN Framework: Voice AI That Can Actually Be Interrupted
summary: TEN Framework is an open-source framework for building real-time voice AI agents with streaming audio, interruptions, VAD, turn detection, and multimodal workflows. It uses graph-based extensions and TMAN Designer to handle the challenges of production voice conversational systems that support interruptions and natural dialogue.
writeup: The video covers TEN Framework, an open-source framework for building real-time voice AI agents that handle streaming audio, interruptions, turn detection, and multimodal workflows. It matters because conventional STT-LLM-TTS pipelines struggle with natural conversational dynamics like being interrupted mid-response. The key mechanisms are graph-based extensions and real-time audio pipelines, which together support more natural back-and-forth interactions.
